payload.label: nightstand
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark brown, glossy wooden nightstand showing the top surface and front edge with visible wood grain and a beveled front lip; a teal fabric cushion sits on the upper-left corner, crop is edge-cut and shows only the top and part of the front face, approximate distance ~0.8 m from camera.
